summary: Completed testing of Job Seeker Onboarding Flow (iteration 3). Fixed critical backend bug with file upload endpoints (static mount conflict). Fixed frontend bug with jobs.filter error. All 23 backend tests pass. Onboarding wizard UI works correctly with gamification features (badges, progress bar, confetti).

critical.issue: FIXED: File upload endpoints were returning 405 Method Not Allowed due to StaticFiles mount shadowing the POST routes
critical.fix: Moved app.mount('/api/uploads', ...) after app.include_router(api_router) in server.py

minor.issue: Returns 404 error in admin dashboard (endpoint may not exist or missing implementation)

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: jobs.filter is not a function error when loading jobs page
Badge popup modal blocks clicks on underlying elements when it appears. Users need to click Continue to dismiss it before interacting with other elements.

issues: Good design with gamification elements. Progress bar, step indicators, and badge popups work well.

action_items: None - all critical issues have been fixed
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 103 - StaticFiles mount was shadowing upload POST endpoints. Moved to after router include.
FIXED: App.js line 980 - API returns {jobs: [...], total: N} but frontend expected array directly.
Badge popup could use click-outside-to-dismiss for better UX (not critical)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (onboarding wizard works, badge popup UX could be improved)

seed_data_creation: Tested with existing seed data. Test files created: test_cv.pdf, test_pic.png for upload testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding feature fully tested. File upload endpoints now working. Jobs page bug fixed. Badge popup appears at steps 2, 5, 6 and blocks clicks until dismissed - this is by design but could be improved for UX.

job_seeker_login_redirect_to_onboarding.details: Job seekers with onboarding_completed=false are redirected to /onboarding

recruiter_login_no_onboarding.details: Recruiters see recruiter dashboard, NOT onboarding

admin_login_no_onboarding.details: Admins see admin dashboard, NOT onboarding

onboarding_welcome_screen.details: Step 0 shows user's first name, 'Start my profile' and 'Skip for now' buttons

onboarding_step2_professional.details: Job title input, experience chips, industry dropdown, employment type pills all work

onboarding_step3_skills.details: Skill autocomplete, suggestions, seniority level, key strengths all work

onboarding_step4_cv_upload.details: File upload endpoint works (POST /api/uploads/cv) after fix

onboarding_step5_experience.details: Can add work experience entries, set availability

onboarding_step6_profile_boost.details: Profile photo upload, intro text, open to opportunities toggle work

back_button.details: Back button navigates to previous step

skip_step.details: Skip button advances to next step without saving

skip_onboarding_entirely.details: POST /api/onboarding/skip marks onboarding complete and redirects to jobs

confetti_animation.details: Confetti CSS animation present in completion screen

step_save_api.details: PUT /api/onboarding/step/{step} saves data and returns updated progress

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.bug: File upload endpoints returning 405 Method Not Allowed
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.root_cause: app.mount('/api/uploads', StaticFiles(...)) was placed before app.include_router(api_router), causing the StaticFiles mount to intercept all requests to /api/uploads/* including POST requests to /api/uploads/cv etc.
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Moved the StaticFiles mount after the router include so API endpoints take priority

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.bug: jobs.filter is not a function error on jobs page
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.root_cause: GET /api/public/jobs returns {jobs: [...], total: N} but frontend expected an array directly

mocked_integrations.payfast: Sandbox mode - Payfast payment gateway is in sandbox mode for testing
